name: URL-safe base64 encode/decode
task: Create /tmp/eval_b64/b64.py with two functions: b64_encode(data) returning URL-safe base64 (no '=' padding) as a str; b64_decode(s) returning bytes, accepting input with or without padding.

validation.script: import importlib.util; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_b64/b64.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); enc = mod.b64_encode('Hello, World!'); assert '=' not in enc; assert mod.b64_decode(enc) == b'Hello, World!'; print('OK')
